name: A Strong Balanced-Softmax Classifier-Retraining Baseline for Long-Tailed Recognition (CBRM)
content: Long-tailed recognition methods often modify losses, margins, or representations to reduce the dominance of frequent classes. We ask whether, after Balanced Softmax training, the remaining tail error can be reduced by retraining only the classifier. We evaluate BS-cRT, a two-stage procedure that trains a backbone and cosine classifier with Balanced Softmax, freezes the backbone, and updates only the classifier on balanced episodic batches. The second stage keeps the empirical-prior Balanced Soft
summary: 通过仅重新训练分类器，我们发现即使在平衡软最大化训练之后，仍然可以显著减少长尾类别的错误。这种方法在多个数据集上提高了少样本识别的准确性。
key_insights: BS-cRT方法能够有效减少长尾类别上的错误率，特别是在处理不平衡的数据集时表现优异。
尽管平衡软最大化训练已经优化了主分类器，但通过仅重新训练分类器，仍然可以进一步提升模型性能。
CBRM方法揭示了边界最小化风险的两个潜在问题，并建议在设计边界监督时需要考虑类别频率的影响。
xihe_relevance: 对曦和的潜在价值在于提供了一种新的思路来优化长尾识别任务，特别是对于那些数据不平衡的情况。
